editorial.title: Faulty Grid Paths
editorial.optimalSolution: To find optimal path, use dynamic programming to track min and max sum at each cell

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution {public: int findMinAndMax(vector<vector<int>>& grid, int i, int j, int n, int m) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= m || j >= n) return 0; if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) return grid[i][j]; int a = findMinAndMax(grid, i, j+1, n, m); int b = findMinAndMax(grid, i+1, j, n, m); return a + b; } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution {public int findMinAndMax(int[][] grid, int i, int j, int n, int m) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= m || j >= n) return 0; if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) return grid[i][j]; int a = findMinAndMax(grid, i, j+1, n, m); int b = findMinAndMax(grid, i+1, j, n, m); return a + b; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def find_min_and_max(self, grid, i, j, n, m) -> int: if i < 0 or j < 0 or i >= m or j >= n: return 0 if i == m-1 and j == n-1: return grid[i][j] a = self.find_min_and_max(grid, i, j+1, n, m) b = self.find_min_and_max(grid, i+1, j, n, m) return a + b
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function findMinAndMax(grid, i, j, n, m) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= m || j >= n) return 0; if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) return grid[i][j]; var a = findMinAndMax(grid, i, j+1, n, m); var b = findMinAndMax(grid, i+1, j, n, m); return a + b; }

functionSignature.java: public boolean solve(int n, int m);
functionSignature.python: def solve(self, n: int, m: int) -> bool:

solutions.python: import sys class Solution: def find_min_and_max(self, grid, i, j, n, m) -> int: if i < 0 or j < 0 or i >= m or j >= n: return 0 if i == m-1 and j == n-1: return grid[i][j] a = self.find_min_and_max(grid, i, j+1, n, m) b = self.find_min_and_max(grid, i+1, j, n, m) return a + b def solve(n, m) -> bool: grid = [[int(x) for x in input().split()] for _ in range(m)] return find_min_and_max(grid, 0, 0, n, m) if __name__ == '__main__': n, m = map(int, input().split()) print(solve(n, m))
solutions.cpp: #include <iostream> using namespace std; class Solution { public: int findMinAndMax(vector<vector<int>>& grid, int i, int j, int n, int m) { if (i < 0 || j < 0 || i >= m || j >= n) return 0; if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) return grid[i][j]; int a = findMinAndMax(grid, i, j+1, n, m); int b = findMinAndMax(grid, i+1, j, n, m); return a + b; } int solve() { int n, m; cin >> n >> m; vector<vector<int>> grid(m, vector<int>(n)); for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) { cin >> grid[i][j]; } } return findMinAndMax(grid, 0, 0, n, m); } }; int main() { Solution solution; return solution.solve(); }
